# Phase 4 Closure Plan

This planning note records the Phase 4 closure review posture for future repository readiness work.

## Closure Concepts

- Closure outcome tracking
- Evidence summary tracking
- Blocker and warning review
- Governance finding review
- Orchestration finding review
- Execution safety finding review
- Contributor governance finding review
- CI readiness finding review
- Survivability finding review
- Fail-closed review when repository-wide runtime communication paths are found

## Non-Execution Statement

This file does not create workflows, deployment automation, provider integrations, runtime communication, credentials, branch protection settings, or automatic approvals.
